policies.description: No direct push to main/master. All work goes via feature branch + PR.
Never use --no-verify, --no-gpg-sign, or similar hook-bypass flags.
PR title + body render in operator_language (from .autopilot/config.json).

Agent-facing Markdown (PROJECT-RULES.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, DIALOGUE-PROTOCOL.md, .claude/commands/*.md, .prompts/*.md) must be UTF-8 with BOM. Exception: .agents/skills/**/SKILL.md and .agents/skills/**/agents/openai.yaml must be UTF-8 without BOM.
